## Diagram 3

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant Script
    participant SparkSession
    participant DataFrame
    participant S3
    
    Script->>Script: Parse command line args
    Script->>Script: Generate 100 rows of data
    Script->>SparkSession: builder.getOrCreate()
    SparkSession-->>Script: spark session
    Script->>SparkSession: createDataFrame(data, schema)
    SparkSession-->>Script: df
    Script->>DataFrame: withColumn('square', pow(value, 2))
    DataFrame-->>Script: df2
    Script->>DataFrame: write.parquet(s3_output_path)
    DataFrame->>S3: Write parquet file
    S3-->>DataFrame: Write complete
```
